title: Gigantes Plaki
description: A classic Greek dish made with large lima beans in a rich tomato sauce, often served as a side or main course.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the tomato sauce and stir to combine.
Add the gigantes, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook, covered, until the beans are tender, about 20-25 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
